title: otachyrium piligerum
intro: Otachyrium piligerum, also known as "false lavender" due to its resemblance to the lavender plant, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Its medicinal properties are believed to help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, while also providing antioxidant and anti-anxiety benefits. In herbal preparations, Otachyrium piligerum is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
